figures.caption: FIG. 1. Relative improvements for the unweighting efficiencies ϵ0.001, both for e+e− + n gluons (left) and for tt̄+n gluons (right), as a function of n. The improvements are shown for the Coupling Flows (“Coupling”), and ODE Flows (“ODE”), compared to Vegas. Each curve represents the mean over ten independent evaluations of the unweighting efficiency with corresponding statistical errors.
